title: chamaecrista obcordata
intro: Chamaecrista obcordata, also known as the horsefly weed or sensitive plant, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Chamaecrista obcordata include its potential to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its ability to support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment, and is often used in herbal remedies to treat a range of health issues.
